description: NorthStar Health product catalogue (internal and competitor products) MCP server, backed by Azure AI Search.

tools.name: list_products
tools.description: List the product catalogue, optionally filtered by category, market, brand or competitor-only.

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search the product catalogue by free-text need, benefit or claim (semantic + vector search).

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Get a single product's full metadata by product id (e.g. 'VIT-1001').

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List the distinct product categories in the catalogue.

tools.name: list_brands
tools.description: List the distinct brands in the catalogue (NorthStar + competitors).

tools.name: get_positioning
tools.description: Return a product's competitive positioning summary plus competing products in the same category.
